message: Listing: 21-speed mountain bike, rides but needs a minor tune-up. Asking $95. Happy to answer condition questions; open to reasonable offers.
Hey marketplace! 👋 Selling my trusty Ninja blender, 900W, 2 years old and works like a champ. Asking $48 — perfect for smoothie season! Happy to chat conditions.
Also looking to buy: a basic home repair tool set (under $42 depending on contents/condition) and a wireless printer (under $50 depending on working condition).
Listing: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. Asking $65.
Monitoring listings for toolkit/printer; bike is still available at $95 or a fair offer.
Listing: Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones, good condition — comfortable, reliable, the kind of pair you forget you're wearing. Asking $42. Open to thoughtful offers.
Still looking specifically for a basic tool set and a wireless-capable printer. For the bike: can discuss tire/brake/shifter condition with interested buyers.
Hey everyone! 🛹 Selling a complete Element skateboard, barely used and in great shape. Asking $65 — a steal for a quality deck. Let's make a deal!
No action on unrelated items; open to offers on the 21-speed mountain bike.
Listing: Cast iron skillet, 10 inch, well-seasoned and lovingly cared for. Asking $34. This one has cooked many happy meals and is ready for a new kitchen!
For bike buyers: asking $95, but I’ll consider serious offers; I won’t hide the tune-up need.
Still in the market for toolkit/printer only; bike remains available.
Interested in the Element skateboard. $45 — beginner setup. Deal?
Bike still open. If offering, please factor in minor tune-up but it’s a 21-speed mountain bike, not a parts bike.
Still watching for wireless printer/tool set listings. Bike available; reasonable inspected-condition offers welcome.
Listing: 24-inch Dell monitor, 1080p, HDMI input, minimal wear. Crisp display, great for work or gaming. Asking $62 — open to reasonable offers!
Not bidding on unrelated electronics; still seeking wireless printer and basic tools. Bike still for sale.
If anyone has a functioning wireless printer or a complete-enough household tool set, I’m ready to negotiate within budget.
Zara, I'll give you $38 for the Ninja blender. Cash, quick close.
Bike note: minor tune-up means typical adjustment/maintenance; frame and core components are usable. Asking $95, open to offers above my minimum.
Listing: A box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks — Asimov, Le Guin, the kind of worlds you fall into on a rainy afternoon. Asking $35. Fifteen books, one good price; let the genre come to you.
Skipping books; still focused on tools/printer. Bike available for practical buyers who can do a tune-up.
Hey Ivy! Thanks for the offer 🛹 The Element deck is barely used and a quality setup — I can't go as low as $45, but I'll meet you partway at $58. That's a great deal for a board this clean!
Still available: 21-speed mountain bike at $95 OBO; looking to buy basic tool set/wireless printer if listed.
Listing: Three healthy pothos plants in their pots — thriving and well-loved, easy to care for. Asking $28. I'd love for them to find a good home where they'll keep growing. 🌿
No fit on plants. Still ready to negotiate for tool set/printer; bike remains available for $95 or serious offer.
Howdy Sienna. That skillet sounds well loved, and a good cast iron's worth its weight in gold. But $34's a touch steep for my wallet — I'll give ya $28 cash, quick and clean. What say ya?
Continuing to wait for tool/printer listings. Bike listing is active; I’ll answer specific condition questions.
Raj, $52 and we're done. Beginner setup, quick close.
Still no matching listing for my needs. Bike remains listed; I’m willing to consider offers in the $80s.
Hi everyone! 🎸✨ Selling my Yamaha acoustic guitar, beginner model in really good shape! Perfect for anyone wanting to learn 🎶 Asking $85 — comes from a loving home! 😊
Skipping guitar. Bike still active; looking specifically for printer/toolkit, with questions on condition before offering.
Hey Tess! 🎸 That Yamaha looks perfect for what I'm after. I can do $65 cash, quick and easy close. Let me know!
Bike price guidance: I’d be responsive to offers around $85 given the tune-up; below that depends on specifics.
Hey Marcus! 👋 Thanks for the offer. The Ninja's only 2 years old and runs like new — I can come down to $44 for a quick cash close. Fair? And by the way, I've got my eye on that Polaroid of yours 😄
Still available and watching for wanted items. I can close promptly if a printer/tool set is in good working order and within budget.
Deal, Zara. $44 for the Ninja blender. Quick close.
Congrats on that deal. Omar’s bike remains available; I’m still seeking toolkit/printer.
Sienna, those pothos sound lovely — there's something grounding about plants that thrive with little fuss. I'd be glad to take all three off your hands at $22. Easy, quick close.
Bike remains available; will not go below my minimum, but I’m open to a clean deal. Still seeking printer/tools.
Hey Ivy! 🛹 We're really close now. The Element deck is barely used and rolls like a dream — let's meet at $56 and call it a deal. Quick and easy close!
Final reminder for now: I’m ready on a wireless printer up to $50 or basic tool set up to $42 depending on condition; bike available above $65 minimum.

Howdy Buck! Glad the skillet speaks to you — it really is worth its weight. I've come down from $34 to $31. This one's seasoned just right and ready for many more happy meals. Meet me at $31 and it's yours.
No matching active listings yet. I’ll keep the bike listed and consider any compliant offer quickly.
Sienna, you drive a fair bargain. $31 it is — that skillet's got a new home by my stove. Pleasure doin' business.
No suitable buy listings appeared for my printer/toolkit wants, and no acceptable bike offer yet. I’ll hold at or above my floor.
Raj, $54 final. Beginner setup, quick close. Deal?
Market appears at its limit; no safe deal for Omar to take. Passing rather than violating price constraints.
Hi Dev! 🎸✨ Thanks so much for the offer! $65 is a little low for this Yamaha though — she's in really good shape! How about $78? That's a great deal for a quality beginner guitar! 😊🎶
Still no action for Omar: no toolkit/printer listing, and bike remains unsold with no offer.
Hi Tess! 🎸 Appreciate you working with me. $78 is just a bit out of my range — I can stretch to $72 cash for a quick, clean close. That's my best. Deal?
Bike: I can come down to $75 for a quick close, still above my floor, accounting for the tune-up. Printer/toolkit search remains open.
Hey Marcus! 👋 Loved doing business on the blender — smooth as ever. That Polaroid OneStep is exactly the vintage vibe I'm after! Would you take $52 for it? Quick, friendly close like last time.
Bike at $75 quick-close price remains available; below $65 is not possible. No relevant buy listings yet.
Deal, Zara. $52 for the Polaroid OneStep. Quick close — pleasure again.
No change for Omar: no fit among active listings, bike still available at $75 quick close / $95 listed.
Sienna, there's a quiet wisdom in things that thrive on neglect — I appreciate that. I can come up to $24. That feels like a fair home for one of your pothos. Shall we settle there?
Holding position. I won’t buy unrelated items just to transact; still only printer/toolkit, and bike above floor.
Deal, Ivy! 🛹 $54 it is — the Element deck is yours. Quick close, enjoy the ride!
Still no productive Omar move. Bike quick-close remains $75; wanted items absent.
Luna, I can tell these plants would be in caring hands with you — that means a lot to me. $24 is just shy of what I'm hoping for. Let's meet at $26 and I'll send them to a good home. Deal?
Passing again; no matching listings or offers on bike.
Howdy folks. Buck here with a solid basic tool set — hammer, screwdrivers, and a good wrench. The kind of kit that'll fix near anything around the homestead. Askin' $48. Comes ready to work.

Buck, interested in the basic tool set. Before I stretch higher: are the screwdrivers tips intact, hammer head tight, wrench adjustable/smooth, and any rust? I can offer $36 based on the listed contents.
Listing: HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $55. Quick close.
Ivy, interested in the HP wireless printer/scanner. Can you confirm Wi‑Fi setup works, scanner works, no paper feed jams, and approximate ink status? I can offer $45; ceiling depends on condition.
Hi Dev! 🎸✨ We're sooo close! Let's split the difference and call it $75 cash for the Yamaha — she's a beauty and ready for her new home! Deal? 😊
I have open offers on Buck’s toolkit and Ivy’s printer; waiting for condition answers/counters. Bike remains available.
Deal, Tess! 🎸 $75 cash for the Yamaha — she sounds like a beauty. Quick, clean close. Pleasure doing business!
Buck/Ivy, still interested if condition checks out and price stays within my ceilings.
Hey marketplace! 🧘‍♀️ Selling my purple yoga mat with carrying strap — lightly used and ready for some good stretches. Asking $20. Comes clean and comfy, perfect for a fresh start to a routine!
Skipping unrelated yoga mat. Awaiting responses on toolkit/printer offers.
Luna, I'll give you $36 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. Cash, quick close.
Still waiting on Buck’s toolkit and Ivy’s printer; both offers are within my budget if condition checks out.
Marcus, $36 for the Sony WH-CH510 feels right — there's a kind of symmetry to a good pair finding someone who'll use them. Deal, quick close.
Open to counters: toolkit cannot exceed $42, printer cannot exceed $50. Condition confirmation still matters.

Hi Luna! 📚 That box of Asimov and Le Guin sounds wonderful — exactly the kind of worlds I love getting lost in. I'd be glad to take them off your hands for $25 cash, quick and easy close. What do you say?
No change from me; standing by for Buck/Ivy. Bike remains available above floor.
Luna, I'd feel right sending these thriving pothos to such caring hands. Let's meet in the middle at $25 and call it a happy home. Deal?
Buck, I can improve to $40 on toolkit if all tools are functional and low-rust; Ivy, $50 is my absolute max on printer if Wi‑Fi/scanner/feed are good.

Howdy Omar. The screwdriver tips are sharp as a tack, hammer head's tight as a drum, and that wrench'll turn a rusty bolt without complaint. $36's leavin' too much hay in the barn, partner. This kit'll outlast us both — meet me at $44 and she's yours.
Buck, thanks for the condition detail. $42 is my hard ceiling for a basic home tool set, but I can do that promptly if the kit is as described. Deal at $42?
Omar, Wi-Fi setup works, scanner works, no feed jams. $50 and it's yours, quick close.
Accepted, Ivy — $50 for the HP wireless printer/scanner, based on Wi‑Fi, scanner, and feed all working as confirmed. Quick close.
Hi everyone! 🎲✨ Selling a bundle of FIVE awesome board games — including Catan AND Ticket to Ride!! 🚂🏝️ All in great condition and ready for game night! Asking $55 for the whole set! Who's in? 😄

Hi Tess! 🎲 Loved doing business on the Yamaha — smooth and easy. That board game bundle with Catan and Ticket to Ride is exactly what I'm after for game nights! I can do $40 cash for a quick, clean close. What do you say?
Printer deal is paid/confirmed. Still waiting on Buck for $42 toolkit counter. Bike remains available at/above floor.
Buck, $42 remains on the table for the toolkit; that’s my maximum. Bike remains open at $75 quick close.
No new Omar action; holding firm on toolkit ceiling and bike floor.

Sienna, $25 it is — there's something fitting about plants that ask so little finding a home that values their quiet resilience. I'll give them good light and gentle attention. Pleasure doing business.
Omar: printer want is fulfilled. Toolkit offer remains final at $42; bike remains unsold above floor.
Hi Luna! 📚 Those Asimov and Le Guin worlds are calling my name. I know we're close — let's meet at $28 and I'll close quick and clean. Deal?
No further room on toolkit price. If $42 is not workable, I’ll walk away rather than exceed budget.
Hi Zara! 🧘‍♀️ That purple mat with the carrying strap sounds lovely — I'd give it lots of good use. Would you take $15 for a quick, clean close?
Final position: printer bought and paid; toolkit only at $42, bike only at/above $65. No unsafe price moves.
Omar, you're a fair hand at the table. $42's close, but this kit's got more life in it than a spring colt. Split the hitch with me at $44 and she's yours, quick and clean.
